title: Modules, Resolution, Packages, and Declaration Files · Contract Lens: Module Augmentation
summary: Publish a small typed library whose runtime exports, package metadata, and declaration surface agree in clean consumers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts module augmentation increment in a consumable ESM package with declaration evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use augmentation or declaration merging only for owned, documented extension points with load-order evidence.
Author or inspect declaration files that describe real runtime values without implementations or false guarantees.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
